title: German Casserole with Morbier and Bitter Greens
description: A hearty German-inspired casserole featuring Morbier cheese and a tangy bitter greens mix.
instructions: Cook the German sausages in a pan over medium heat until browned.
Add the sliced onion to the pan and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sliced Morbier cheese and cubed casserole bread.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the cooked sausage mixture.
Top with a layer of the Morbier cheese and casserole bread mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and top with chopped bitter greens.
